summary: V1.1.1 Tesseract Vault & Hub Wiring Testing - PASS. Backend: 12/12 pytest tests pass. Frontend: TesseractVault shows 8 Hawaiian relics in 3D tesseract with slot quota pill (0/2 SLOTS), SovereignHub pillar wiring working with in-place pull (URL stays at /sovereign-hub), BackToHub ghost-button fix verified (elementFromPoint returns underlying content, not nav-controls), RPG World Map shows locked region tiles with data-locked attribute.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed missing page imports in ProcessorState.js: SovereignConsole → SovereignDashboard, CrystallineEngine → FractalEngine (pages did not exist)
TesseractVault.js correctly implements vault-slot-quota data-testid and claim/release buttons
RPGPage.js RegionTile correctly implements locked region toast with sonner (lines 157-163)
BackToHub.js pointer-events:none fix on wrapper with pointer-events:auto on buttons is correct pattern
seed_data_creation: Test claims created and cleaned up during vault testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: V1.1.1 testing complete. Backend vault endpoints fully working: catalogue (8 relics), state (quota, claims, slots), claim (tier-lock, idempotent, vault-full), release. Frontend: TesseractVault shows 3D tesseract with 8 Hawaiian relics and slot quota pill. SovereignHub pillar wiring working with in-place pull. BackToHub ghost-button fix verified. RPG locked region tiles have data-locked attribute and toast implementation. Fixed ProcessorState.js missing imports (SovereignConsole, CrystallineEngine pages did not exist).

features_verified.tesseract_vault_state: PASS - Returns quota, catalogue, claims, slots
features_verified.tesseract_vault_claim: PASS - Free-tier claim, tier-lock 403, idempotent, vault-full 402
features_verified.frontend_hub_pillar_wiring: PASS - In-place pull working, URL stays at /sovereign-hub
features_verified.frontend_rpg_locked_regions: PASS - data-locked attribute present, toast implementation verified in code
